title: desmodium procumbens var. typicum
intro: Desmodium procumbens var. typicum, also known as showy tick clover or tick clover, is a perennial legume native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Desmodium procumbens var. typicum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
